falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive sessions
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern featured VIX peaking at 28 and rapidly mean-reverting; sustained VIX above 35 indicates a systemic stress event unlike that tactical washout, invalidating the pattern match and suggesting a deeper regime change rather than a local bottom

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury yield spread inverts further by >25bps from current level
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom occurred with a steepening curve as recession fears faded; renewed aggressive flattening/inversion would signal bond market pricing a hard landing, contradicting the soft-landing narrative embedded in the 78% pattern match

falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below the lower 3-sigma Bollinger Band (20-day, 2.0) on weekly timeframe and holds there for 3+ days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug was characterized by a sharp V-reversal from near the lower band without sustained breakdown; a multi-day hold below 3-sigma would indicate capitulation failure and trend continuation, not the mean-reversion bottom the pattern predicts

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
